title: Authors and Citation

title: Authors and Citation
text: Chubaty (2026). SpaDES.targets: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations 'targets'. R package version 0.0.0.9007, https://github.com/-CAST/SpaDES.targets.
code: @Manual{,   title = {SpaDES.targets: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with 'targets'},   author = {Alex M Chubaty},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9007},   url = {https://github.com/FOR-CAST/SpaDES.targets}, }

title: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with targets
text: Run SpaDES simulations stages targets pipeline. stage runs simInitAndSpades() -process returns discrete components next stage needs — plain objects ordinary targets spatial (terra) objects format = "file" targets — whole simList never serialized across target boundary (avoiding recursive-environment bloat pointer-serialization fragility saveSimList()/loadSimList()). also provides options firewall makes targets sole cache (reproducible.useCache = FALSE, etc.), plus terra-first spatial file-target provenance helpers.

title: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with targets
text: tar_simspades(name, modules, inputs, plain, spatial, ...) — target factory: primary target running stage + one format = "file" target per spatial output. run_simspades() — worker (runs stage safe options, extracts components). spades_safe_options() / with_spades_safe_options() — option firewall. write_spatial() / read_spatial() / is_spatial() — spatial file helpers. extract_components() — split needed objects plain values + spatial file paths. provenance_manifest() — software-environment + input/output fingerprints.

title: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with targets
code: # in _targets.R library(targets) library(SpaDES.targets)  list(   tar_simspades(     "preamble",     modules = "LandWeb_preamble",     plain   = c("sppEquiv", "sppColorVect", "speciesParams", "speciesTable"),     spatial = c("rasterToMatch", "studyArea", "rstFlammable")   ),   tar_simspades(     "speciesData",     modules = "Biomass_speciesData",     inputs  = quote(list(       rasterToMatch = read_spatial(preamble_rasterToMatch),       studyArea     = read_spatial(preamble_studyArea),       sppEquiv      = preamble$sppEquiv     )),     plain   = character(),     spatial = "speciesLayers"   ) )

title: Orchestrate SpaDES Simulations with targets

what: Extract a stage's output manifest from a completed simList — extract_outputs
title: Extract a stage's output manifest from a completed simList — extract_outputs
text: Reads SpaDES.core::outputs(sim) run returns compact manifest every file simulation actually saved, without serializing whole simList. Instead declaring object names priori, discovers simulation's outputs table, runtime-determined file sets captured automatically. table fed SpaDES's save mechanisms :

title: Extract a stage's output manifest from a completed simList — extract_outputs
Extract a stage's output manifest from a completed simList — extract_outputs
text: sim completed simList. plain Optional character vector -memory object names also return -. escape hatch small objects (vectors, data.tables, colour tables) rather pass directly round-trip disk. base_dir Directory manifest file paths made relative (default working directory), paths stay portable across hosts stable targets file-content hashing.

title: Extract a stage's output manifest from a completed simList — extract_outputs
text: named list : manifest: data.frame one row per saved file, columns objectName, file, saveTime, fun, package; files: character vector saved file paths (value companion format = "file" target yield); plain objects, name.

title: Extract a stage's output manifest from a completed simList — extract_outputs
text: objects requested via outputs argument SpaDES.core::simInit() (e.g. per-timestep saves vegTypeMap, standAgeMap, ...); files registered module SpaDES.core::registerOutputs() (e.g. summary module dumping timeseries objects "single" mode); figures written SpaDES.core::Plots() (saved .png/.pdf files appended outputs(sim)).

what: Build a simInit(outputs=) table for terra and RDS objects — outputs_spec
title: Build a simInit(outputs=) table for terra and RDS objects — outputs_spec
text: Convenience constructor outputs data.frame SpaDES.core::simInit() consumes, declaring simulation objects save disk . Objects grouped written – terra::writeRaster(), terra::writeVector(), saveRDS() – table expanded saveTime object can saved several points simulation time. saved files appear outputs(sim) picked extract_outputs().

title: Build a simInit(outputs=) table for terra and RDS objects — outputs_spec
code: outputs_spec(   raster = character(),   vect = character(),   rds = character(),   qs = character(),   csv = character(),   saveTime = NULL )

title: Build a simInit(outputs=) table for terra and RDS objects — outputs_spec
text: raster Character vector object names save terra::writeRaster() (.tif). vect Character vector object names save terra::writeVector() (.gpkg). rds Character vector object names save saveRDS() (.rds). qs Character vector object names save qs2::qs_save() (.qs); read back qs2::qs_read() (see sim_inputs()). csv Character vector object names save data.table::fwrite() (.csv) – flat tables consumed downstream (e.g. LANDIS-II inputs). fwrite writes row names, unlike utils::write.csv(). saveTime Optional numeric vector save times; rows expanded every (object, time) combination. NULL (default) lets SpaDES.core save end(sim).

title: Build a simInit(outputs=) table for terra and RDS objects — outputs_spec
text: data.frame objectName, fun, package (saveTime supplied), suitable SpaDES.core::simInit(outputs=). Filenames left SpaDES.core derive (objectName + time + extension).

title: Build a simInit(outputs=) table for terra and RDS objects — outputs_spec
text: covers common inter-stage handoff timeseries cases; anything exotic (per-object save arguments, mixed save functions one object) build data.frame directly – see ?SpaDES.core::outputs.

title: Build a simInit(outputs=) table for terra and RDS objects — outputs_spec
code: outputs_spec(   raster = c("rasterToMatch", "rstLCC"),   vect = c("studyArea", "studyAreaReporting") ) #>           objectName         fun package #> 1      rasterToMatch writeRaster   terra #> 2             rstLCC writeRaster   terra #> 3          studyArea writeVector   terra #> 4 studyAreaReporting writeVector   terra

what: Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run — provenance_manifest
title: Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run — provenance_manifest
text: Records software environment input/output fingerprints targets track (notably upstream package module versions). Use result per-study-area report write alongside outputs.

title: Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run — provenance_manifest
code: provenance_manifest(   outputs = character(),   renv_lock = "renv.lock",   modules_dir = "modules",   timestamp = format(Sys.time(), tz = "UTC", usetz = TRUE) )

title: Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run — provenance_manifest
text: outputs Optional named unnamed character vector output file paths digest (md5). renv_lock Path project renv.lock (digested present). modules_dir Path modules/ directory git submodules; pinned commits recorded. timestamp timestamp string. Defaults current UTC time; pass explicit value reproducible (re-runnable) manifests.

title: Build a provenance manifest for a pipeline run — provenance_manifest
text: named list describing run.

Read a spatial file written by write_spatial() — read_spatial
text: path file path produced write_spatial().

title: Read a spatial file written by write_spatial() — read_spatial

what: Run one SpaDES stage and return its output manifest — run_simspades
title: Run one SpaDES stage and return its output manifest — run_simspades
text: worker behind tar_simspades(). Runs SpaDES.core::simInitAndSpades() -process safe options (with_spades_safe_options()), stage's saved outputs (figures) directed out_dir, returns manifest files wrote via extract_outputs() (plus plain -memory objects). simList never returned serialized.

title: Run one SpaDES stage and return its output manifest — run_simspades
code: run_simspades(   modules,   objects = list(),   inputs = NULL,   outputs = NULL,   params = list(),   times = list(start = 0, end = 1),   paths = NULL,   plain = character(),   out_dir = ".",   seed = NULL,   .options = list() )

title: Run one SpaDES stage and return its output manifest — run_simspades
text: modules Character vector (list) module names. objects Named list -memory objects passed simInitAndSpades(objects =) (small upstream components passed directly). inputs data.frame passed simInitAndSpades(inputs =) SpaDES loads file-backed upstream outputs ; typically built sim_inputs() upstream manifest. NULL none. outputs data.frame passed simInitAndSpades(outputs =) declaring objects save (mechanism LandWeb uses per-timestep saves). NULL rely solely module-side saving (registerOutputs() / Plots()). params list module parameters. times list start end. paths list SpaDES paths (e.g. modulePath, inputPath, scratchPath). outputPath overridden out_dir. scratchPath set, run uses unique subdir beneath removes subdir exit, pipeline phase cleans scratch concurrent runs collide. plain Character vector naming -memory objects also return -; see extract_outputs(). out_dir Directory stage's saved outputs figures (set paths$outputPath). seed Optional integer seed set run (deterministic replicates). .options Extra options merged spades_safe_options().

title: Run one SpaDES stage and return its output manifest — run_simspades
text: extract_outputs() result: list manifest data.frame, files character vector, plain objects.

what: Build a simInit(inputs=) table from an upstream manifest — sim_inputs
title: Build a simInit(inputs=) table from an upstream manifest — sim_inputs
text: Turns manifest produced extract_outputs() inputs data.frame SpaDES.core::simInit() consumes, downstream stage loads dependencies files upstream stage wrote – symmetric saved, without loading orchestrating process. load function left SpaDES.core deduce file's extension.

title: Build a simInit(inputs=) table from an upstream manifest — sim_inputs
code: sim_inputs(manifest, objects = NULL, at = NULL, loadTime = NULL, files = NULL)

title: Build a simInit(inputs=) table from an upstream manifest — sim_inputs
text: manifest manifest data.frame (manifest element extract_outputs() result) whole result list. objects Optional character vector restricting objectNames load; defaults every object manifest. Optional numeric saveTime select; defaults recent save object. loadTime Optional numeric loadTime passed inputs table (file loaded simulation time). files Optional character vector tracked output file paths (value companion <stage>_files target). supplied, every selected file must present .

title: Build a simInit(inputs=) table from an upstream manifest — sim_inputs
text: data.frame file objectName columns (plus loadTime supplied), suitable SpaDES.core::simInit(inputs=).

title: Build a simInit(inputs=) table from an upstream manifest — sim_inputs
text: Pass companion format = "file" target (<stage>_files target tar_simspades()) files downstream target gains file-content dependency upstream outputs (otherwise targets see manifest paths, contents) requested files validated actually tracked.

what: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
title: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
text: Returns set options make targets sole orchestrator cache disable known-destructive / non-headless-safe PredictiveEcology behaviours. particular :

title: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
text: strict TRUE, turn development diagnostics back (spades.debug, spades.moduleCodeChecks, spades.testMemoryLeaks, spades.keepCompleted), production default (FALSE) leaves speed/memory. Use development validate modules.

title: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
text: named list options suitable base::options() withr::with_options().

title: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
text: makes caching pass-targets cache (reproducible.useCache = FALSE, etc.); keeps simList serialized disk exit (spades.saveSimOnExit = FALSE) – package never serializes simList; keeps spatial reads terra path (reproducible.rasterRead, reproducible.shapefileRead); guards non-interactive worker hanging browser() (spades.browserOnError = FALSE) blocking download prompt (reproducible.interactiveOnDownloadFail = FALSE). single place encodes option "firewall" – one adapter absorbs upstream option renames/removals (e.g. dev-version renames spades.allowSequentialCaching -> spades.cacheChaining reproducible.useTerra -> reproducible.rasterRead, handled ). Audited SpaDES.core 3.1.2.9016 / reproducible 3.1.1.9062; audit dev bump. set (left caller / per run): reproducible.leaveOnDisk (keep TRUE default, pin terra scratch + memfrac always write_spatial() process/target boundary file-backed rasters stay valid), Google Drive download knobs (reproducible.gdriveNoAuth / reproducible.useGdown), per-project asset-specific.

title: Safe 'SpaDES'/'reproducible' options for targets-orchestrated runs — spades_safe_options
code: str(spades_safe_options()) #> List of 21 #>  $ Require.install                       : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.useRequire                     : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.cacheChaining                  : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.allowSequentialCaching         : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useCache                 : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useMemoise               : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useCloud                 : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.allowInitDuringSimInit         : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.futureEvents                   : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.recoveryMode                   : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.saveSimOnExit                  : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.browserOnError                 : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.interactiveOnDownloadFail: logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.objSize                  : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useTerra                 : logi TRUE #>  $ reproducible.rasterRead               : chr "terra::rast" #>  $ reproducible.shapefileRead            : chr "terra::vect" #>  $ spades.debug                          : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.moduleCodeChecks               : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.testMemoryLeaks                : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.keepCompleted                  : logi FALSE str(spades_safe_options(strict = TRUE)) #> List of 21 #>  $ Require.install                       : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.useRequire                     : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.cacheChaining                  : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.allowSequentialCaching         : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useCache                 : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useMemoise               : logi FALSE #>  $ reproducible.useCloud                 : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.allowInitDuringSimInit         : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.futureEvents                   : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.recoveryMode                   : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.saveSimOnExit                  : logi FALSE #>  $ spades.browserOnError reproducible.rasterRead               : chr "terra::rast" #>  $ reproducible.shapefileRead            : chr "terra::vect" #>  $ spades.debug                          : logi TRUE #>  $ spades.moduleCodeChecks               : logi TRUE #>  $ spades.testMemoryLeaks                : logi TRUE #>  $ spades.keepCompleted                  : logi TRUE

what: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
text: Builds targets one simInitAndSpades stage:

title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
code: tar_simspades(   name,   modules,   objects = quote(list()),   inputs = NULL,   outputs = NULL,   params = list(),   times = list(start = 0, end = 1),   paths = NULL,   plain = character(),   out_dir = NULL,   seed = NULL,   format = "rds",   .options = list() )

title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
text: name Character scalar; primary target's name. modules Character vector (list) module names stage. objects quoted expression giving small -memory upstream components pass simInitAndSpades(objects =) (e.g. quote(list(sppEquiv = preamble$sppEquiv))). Defaults quote(list()). inputs quoted expression giving simInit(inputs=) table file-backed upstream outputs, typically quote(sim_inputs(preamble, objects = c(...), files = preamble_files)). NULL none. outputs quoted expression (literal data.frame) declaring objects save , passed simInit(outputs=). NULL rely solely module-side saving (registerOutputs() / Plots()). params, times, paths, seed, .options Passed run_simspades(). plain Character vector naming -memory objects primary target also return -. out_dir Directory stage's saved outputs figures; defaults file.path("outputs", name). format targets storage format primary target (default "rds"; use "qs2" qs2 format registered).

title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
text: list two tar_target objects (primary, companion format = "file" target) — return _targets.R like target list.

title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
text: primary target name runs stage (run_simspades()) returns output manifest (data.frame mapping saved objectName file), files character vector, plain -memory objects; one format = "file" target name_files whose command name[["files"]], targets content-hashes every file stage wrote (per-timestep saves, summary dumps, Plots() figures alike) invalidates downstream change. Downstream stages consume plain components name$<obj> saved files via sim_inputs() name$manifest (passing name_files files dependency), feeding simInit inputs. simList ever crosses target boundary.

title: Target factory: a SpaDES stage as targets — tar_simspades
code: tl <- tar_simspades("preamble", modules = "LandWeb_preamble") length(tl) # primary + companion file target #> [1] 2

Evaluate code with the safe SpaDES options set — with_spades_safe_options

Use development validate modules.

title: Evaluate code with the safe SpaDES options set — with_spades_safe_options
text: value code, invisibly code invisible.

title: Write a spatial object to a file (for a format =

title: SpaDES.targets (development version)
text: outputs_spec() gains per-object qs csv groups (qs2::qs_save data.table::fwrite), stage can declare qs2/csv saves helper instead hand-building outputs data.frame; sim_inputs() maps back qs2::qs_read / data.table::fread. SpaDES.targets emits fun/package strings (actual save runs SpaDES.core worker), adds dependencies. (csv uses fwrite – row names, unlike utils::write.csv.) run_simspades() resolves simInit(inputs=) file absolute path (working directory, .e. project root worker) just run: SpaDES.core resolves relative input file inputPath, send project-relative outputs/preamble/x.tif manifest path inputs/outputs/preamble/x.tif. stored manifest stays project-relative/portable; -flight simInit() call sees absolute path. extract_outputs() now keeps manifest file paths PROJECT-relative even stage writes symlinked subdir shared storage (e.g. outputs symlinked NFS): symlink-resolved absolute path re-relativized project root (deepest shared path component, outputs/preamble/x.tif) rather relativized ../../../../mnt/... escape fails resolve downstream simInit(inputs=). run_simspades() now clears out_dir start run re-run regenerates cleanly; terra::writeRaster()/writeVector() module-side saves overwrite, leftover files prior (e.g. failed) run otherwise error. extract_components() removed favour extract_outputs(). Breaking change: replace extract_components(sim, plain, spatial) (write named spatial objects per-object file paths) declaring saves via outputs_spec() / simInit(outputs=) reading resulting manifest extract_outputs(). extract_outputs() extracts stage’s saved files dynamically outputs(sim) run, returning manifest data.frame plus files vector. captures runtime-determined output sets – per-timestep saves, module registerOutputs() dumps, Plots() figures – need declared priori. outputs_spec() builds simInit(outputs=) table terra RDS objects grouped save function, expanded saveTime. outputs_spec(vect = ) now also handles modules still emit sf/sfc objects: sf installed, terra::writeVector() methods coercing sf/sfc SpatVector registered load, terra-first save path works -yet-converted modules (e.g. LandWeb_preamble); bridge, unused module emits SpatVector directly. run_simspades() gains objects, inputs, outputs arguments mapping directly onto simInitAndSpades() arguments name, directs stage’s saved outputs out_dir, returns extract_outputs() manifest. Breaking change: former inputs argument (-memory object list) now objects. run_simspades() now runs stage unique subdir paths$scratchPath removes exit, pipeline phase cleans scratch concurrent runs collide. sim_inputs() builds simInit(inputs=) table upstream manifest, downstream stage reloads file-backed outputs ; pass companion <stage>_files target register file-content dependency. tar_simspades() now emits primary target (output manifest) plus single companion <name>_files format = "file" target tracking every saved file, instead one file target per declared spatial object. Breaking change: spatial argument removed inputs/outputs/objects map onto run_simspades() arguments name. initial version. tar_simspades() target factory: runs one simInitAndSpades() stage emits components targets (plain objects + one format = "file" target per spatial output); simList serialized. run_simspades() worker: runs stage safe options extracts components. spades_safe_options() / with_spades_safe_options(): options “firewall” makes targets sole cache disables known-destructive / non-headless-safe reproducible/SpaDES.core behaviours. Audited SpaDES.core 3.1.2.9016 / reproducible 3.1.1.9062: adds spades.saveSimOnExit = FALSE (dev default TRUE serialize simList), spades.browserOnError = FALSE reproducible.interactiveOnDownloadFail = FALSE (guards hanging non-interactive worker browser() download prompt); replaces dead reproducible.useTerra reproducible.rasterRead = "terra::rast" keeps reproducible.shapefileRead = "terra::vect" (now meaningful override); sets spades.cacheChaining renamed-away spades.allowSequentialCaching. strict argument turns development diagnostics (spades.debug, spades.moduleCodeChecks, spades.testMemoryLeaks, spades.keepCompleted) back , production default leaves . write_spatial() / read_spatial() / is_spatial(): terra-first spatial file-target helpers. provenance_manifest(): record R/platform, renv.lock digest, module submodule commits, output digests.
